expectations.text: None of the 4 steps marked as a confirmed pass given the lack of log evidence
expectations.evidence: '4 個步驟的 log 全部缺失... 沒有任何一行提到 validate、charge、inventory、email' — treated as unverifiable, not passed.

expectations.text: Logging Quality section explicitly flags: no per-step lines, no log levels, no identifying context
expectations.evidence: '沒有任何可追蹤欄位' and '4 個步驟的 log 全部缺失', though not organized under a distinct labeled section — woven into 發現的問題 instead.

expectations.text: Overall verdict carries an explicit caveat, not an unqualified PASS
expectations.evidence: '這份 log 嚴重不足，無法用來驗證 pipeline 是否照 plan 執行' — does not issue a PASS at all, arguably stricter than with_skill's 'PASS WITH WARNINGS'.

expectations.text: Output Value Checks section explicitly states the checks could not be performed
expectations.evidence: No distinct output-value-checks section; covers the idea generally ('無法判斷是否正確執行') but doesn't walk through the plan's specific 3 output-value expectations one by one.

expectations.text: Output is saved as a structured report file
expectations.evidence: Only chat_summary.md was produced; no persisted report file.
